tasks.name: Purchase the cheapest English time management ebook under $15 with rating 4.0+
tasks.description: Find time management ebooks, filter to English-language ebooks under $15 with rating at least 4.0, sort by price, and add the cheapest matching ebook to the cart so the cart contains exactly one such item.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the search bar in the header.
Type "time management" into the search field.
Press Enter or click the search icon to execute the search.
In the filters sidebar, click the Format section and select the "eBook" option.
In the Price filter, set the maximum price field to 15.
In the Rating filter, select the option for "4 stars & up" or set the minimum rating to 4.0 using a rating slider.
In the Language filter, select "English".
Open the sort dropdown above the results and choose "Price: Low to High".
Click on the first product card in the sorted results list (the cheapest matching ebook), then on its product page click the "Add to cart" button.

tasks.name: Add three recent sci-fi ebooks between $5–$12 with rating 4.2+ to the cart
tasks.description: From the Science Fiction category, filter to ebooks priced between $5 and $12 with rating at least 4.2, sort by newest publication date, and add the first three matching ebooks to the cart so the cart contains exactly three such sci-fi ebooks.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the "Categories" menu in the main navigation bar.
From the category list, click on "Science Fiction".
In the filters sidebar, open the Format section and select the "eBook" option.
In the Price filter, set the minimum price to 5 and the maximum price to 12.
In the Rating filter, use the rating slider or input to set the minimum rating to 4.2.
Open the sort dropdown above the product grid and select "Publication Date: Newest First".
From the sorted results, starting at the top, open the first three ebooks in new tabs by clicking their titles or covers, and on each of those three product pages click the "Add to cart" button.

tasks.name: Save four premium business ebooks (>$20, 4.5+ stars) to the wishlist
tasks.description: In the Business & Economics category, filter to ebooks priced over $20 with rating at least 4.5, sort by rating, and add the first four matching ebooks to the wishlist so the wishlist contains these four high-priced business ebooks.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the "Categories" menu and select "Business & Economics" from the list.
In the filters sidebar, open the Format section and choose "eBook".
In the Price filter, set the minimum price field to 20.
In the Rating filter, select the option for "4.5 stars & up" or set the minimum rating to 4.5 using a slider.
Open the sort dropdown above the results and select "Customer Rating: High to Low".
From the top of the sorted results list, click on the first ebook’s cover or title to open its product page.
On that product page, click the "Add to wishlist" button.
Use the "Back to results" link or the browser back button to return to the business ebooks results page.
Repeat the process of opening the next three ebooks in the results list and clicking "Add to wishlist" on each product page until four ebooks matching the filters have been added to the wishlist.

tasks.name: Compare two Python programming ebooks under $30 and add the one with more pages to the cart
tasks.description: Search for Python programming ebooks under $30, take the two highest-rated results, compare their page counts, and add the one with the higher page count to the cart so the cart contains that single chosen ebook.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the search bar in the header.
Type "Python programming" into the search field and press Enter to run the search.
In the filters sidebar, open the Format section and select "eBook".
In the Price filter, set the maximum price to 30.
Open the sort dropdown above the results and choose "Customer Rating: High to Low".
Click on the first product title in the results to open its details page in a new tab.
Return to the search results tab and click on the second product title to open its details page in another new tab.
On the two product detail pages, locate the listed page count for each ebook and determine which of the two has the higher page count.
On the product page of the ebook with the higher page count, click the "Add to cart" button.

tasks.name: Preorder the earliest-releasing fantasy ebook after Jan 1, 2025 under $25
tasks.description: From the Fantasy category, find upcoming ebooks releasing after January 1, 2025, filter to those under $25, sort by soonest release date, and preorder the earliest-releasing matching ebook, proceeding to the checkout flow with that preorder in the cart.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the "Categories" menu and choose "Fantasy".
In the filters sidebar, open the Format section and select "eBook".
In the Availability or Release Date filter, select the option for "Upcoming" or "Preorder" items.
In the release date range controls, set the start date to "January 1, 2025".
In the Price filter, set the maximum price to 25.
Open the sort dropdown above the results and select "Release Date: Soonest First".
Click on the first product in the results list (the earliest-releasing matching fantasy ebook) to open its product page.
On the product page, click the "Preorder eBook" button.
After the preorder is added, click the "Proceed to checkout" button from the mini-cart or cart panel that appears.

tasks.name: Buy two top-rated romance ebooks over $15 each and apply promo code READ10 at checkout
tasks.description: In the Romance category, select two top-rated ebooks priced above $15, add them to the cart so their combined original price exceeds $30, and on the cart page apply the promo code READ10 in the promotion field.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the "Categories" menu and select "Romance".
In the filters sidebar, open the Format section and choose "eBook".
In the Price filter, set the minimum price to 15.
In the Rating filter, choose the option for "4 stars & up".
Open the sort dropdown above the results and select "Customer Rating: High to Low".
Click on the first ebook in the results list to open its product page, then click the "Add to cart" button.
Return to the Romance results page and click on the second ebook in the list to open its product page, then click the "Add to cart" button.
Click on the cart icon in the header to navigate to the cart page.
On the cart page, locate the promo code or coupon field, type "READ10" into the field, and click the "Apply" button.

tasks.name: Save one highly rated Spanish self-help ebook under $12 to the wishlist
tasks.description: From the Self-Help category, filter to Spanish-language ebooks costing less than $12 with rating at least 4.3, and add the cheapest matching ebook to the wishlist so the wishlist gains this specific item.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the "Categories" menu and choose "Self-Help".
In the filters sidebar, open the Format section and select "eBook".
In the Price filter, set the maximum price to 12.
In the Language filter, select "Spanish".
In the Rating filter or rating slider, set the minimum rating to 4.3.
Open the sort dropdown above the results and choose "Price: Low to High".
Click on the first product in the filtered results list to open its product detail page.
On the product page, click the "Add to wishlist" button.

tasks.name: Add one ebook by a specific author and two related recommendations under $18 with 4+ stars to the cart
tasks.description: Search for a specific author, open their author page, pick a highly rated ebook under $18, then from its recommendation section choose two additional ebooks under $18 with at least 4.0 stars, and add all three to the cart.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the search bar and type the author name "Neil Gaiman", then press Enter to search.
On the results page, click on the "Authors" tab or the "View author page" link for Neil Gaiman.
On the author page, locate the list of books and use the Format filter to select "eBook".
Open the sort dropdown for the author’s ebooks and choose "Customer Rating: High to Low".
From the sorted list, click on the first ebook that has a listed price under 18 to open its product details page.
On this product page, click the "Add to cart" button.
Scroll down on the same product page to the "Customers also bought" or "You may also like" section.

Within that recommendations section, identify two ebooks that each show a price under 18 and a rating of at least 4.0 stars, then open each of those two recommended ebooks in new tabs by clicking their covers and click "Add to cart" on each of their product pages.
